raw_text:
Intern Backend Engineer

Join our Backend Engineering team as an Intern and gain hands-on
experience building scalable microservices and distributed systems. You'll
work alongside experienced engineers to develop and maintain core backend
services, write production-quality code, and learn industry best practices

in designing APIs, working with message queues, and database optimization.

This is an excellent opportunity to apply your computer science
fundamentals in a real-world environment and contribute to systems that

power our customers' businesses.

About the Company

DataStream Systems is a growing technology startup focused on developing

infrastructure and tools for real-time data processing and analytics. Our
mission is to empower enterprises with the ability to build, deploy, and

scale distributed backend systems that can handle millions of events per
second with sub-second latency.

What You'll Own

1. Develop and maintain REST API endpoints in Python/Go following
established design patterns and our internal API guidelines

2. Write unit tests and integration tests for new backend features using

pytest and standard testing frameworks

3. Work with PostgreSQL and Redis to design efficient database queries

and optimize data retrieval patterns

4. Participate in code reviews with senior engineers and implement

feedback to improve code quality

5. Collaborate on designing and implementing microservices that

communicate via RabbitMQ for asynchronous processing

6. Debug and troubleshoot issues in production and staging environments

with guidance from senior engineers

at DataStream Systems — Building scalable real-time data pipelines forenterprise applicationsSan Francisco, CA (Remote-friendly) • Internship (Full-time) • $28-32/hour 7. Document your code and create runbooks for services you develop with

mentorship from the team

8. Contribute to infrastructure improvements and deployment pipelines

using Docker and Kubernetes

Required

Preferred

Currently pursuing or recently
completed (within 6 months) a
Bachelor's degree in Computer

Science, Computer Engineering,
or related field
Strong foundation in data
structures, algorithms, and
object-oriented programming
principles

Experience with at least one
backend programming language
(Python, Go, Java, or Rust)
Familiarity with relational
databases and SQL fundamentals
Understanding of HTTP/REST APIs
and basic networking concepts

Experience building and
consuming REST APIs in a real
project or internship

Familiarity with Docker,
containerization, or basic
DevOps concepts
Knowledge of message queues or
asynchronous processing
patterns

Exposure to microservices
architecture or distributed
systems

Technologies

Python   Go   PostgreSQL   Redis   RabbitMQ   REST APIs   Docker   Kubernetes

gRPC   Git

Perks & Benefits

Competitive hourly internship rate with potential for conversion to
full-time role
Mentorship from senior engineers and dedicated learning time each week
Free access to professional development courses and conference
attendance opportunities
Flexible working hours and remote-friendly environment
Collaborative team culture with regular tech talks and knowledge-
sharing sessions

Next Steps

 Submit your resume, a brief cover letter, and a link to your GitHub
profile (or code portfolio) to careers@datastreamsystems.com with the
subject line 'Intern Backend Engineer Application'. Include any notable
projects or contributions you'd like us to review. We review applications
on a rolling basis and conduct technical interviews with promising
candidates.
